gap: manual:discarded-overlapping-attempts — Earlier implementation-node attempts overlapped, one nested-tool invocation lost its final envelope, and shared-fixture processes were contaminated; duplicate/contaminated processes were terminated and excluded, then one clean sequential Meta run passed and the terminal run-chains receipt was separately clean.
gap: manual:planner-acceptance-set-omitted-663 — The planner's post-move acceptance command omitted the newly added #663 reference, so the fail-closed verifier returned changelog_unknown_reference; the corrected authoritative set including #663 passed.
